text:
<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"In Q3 2024, adjusted EBITDA margin expanded to 32.4%, up 180 basis points year-over-year." [/INST]
Sentiment: positive. This statement reflects favorable financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"The company recorded a goodwill impairment charge of $847 million during the fiscal year." [/INST]
Sentiment: negative. This statement reflects unfavorable financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"Revenue from international operations remained flat, comprising approximately 43% of total revenue." [/INST]
Sentiment: neutral. This statement reflects neutral financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"Operating cash flow improved significantly, reaching $2.1 billion compared to $1.4 billion in the prior year." [/INST]
Sentiment: positive. This statement reflects favorable financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"The company's leverage ratio increased to 4.8x net debt-to-EBITDA following the acquisition." [/INST]
Sentiment: negative. This statement reflects unfavorable financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"Management expects full-year guidance to remain in line with previously communicated ranges." [/INST]
Sentiment: neutral. This statement reflects neutral financial conditions. </s>

Sentiment: positive. This statement reflects favorable financial conditions. </s>

Sentiment: neutral. This statement reflects neutral financial conditions. </s>

<s>[INST] Classify the sentiment of the following financial statement and briefly explain your reasoning:

"Free cash flow conversion reached 98% of net income, reflecting strong working capital management throughout the year." [/INST]
